name: EquityPro — Expired Listings Detection + Skip Trace + Deliver

nodes.name: Get Last Timestamp
nodes.notes: Reads the last ModificationTimestamp from replication_state to know where to resume polling.

parameters.url: ={{ $vars.MLSGRID_API_BASE_URL }}/Property?$filter=OriginatingSystemName eq 'mfrmls' and ModificationTimestamp gt {{ $json.last_modification_timestamp }} and StandardStatus eq 'Expired'&$top=200

nodes.name: Query MLS Grid — Expired
nodes.notes: Queries MLS Grid for records modified since last timestamp with StandardStatus=Expired. Does NOT filter by MlgCanView — required for replication to catch removals.

nodes.name: Has Results?
nodes.notes: Only proceed if MLS Grid returned expired listings.

nodes.name: Split Into Items
nodes.notes: Splits the MLS Grid response array into individual listing items.

nodes.name: Apply Client Filters
nodes.notes: Filters by county and price range. These fields are NOT searchable in MLS Grid so must be filtered client-side.

nodes.name: Check Duplicate
nodes.notes: Checks if this listing_key already exists in Supabase. If found, skip it.

nodes.name: Is New?
nodes.notes: If Supabase returned no match (empty), this is a new listing — proceed. Otherwise skip.

nodes.name: Transform Listing Data
nodes.notes: Maps MLS Grid fields to Supabase column names. Also calculates days_on_market.

nodes.name: Insert Listing
nodes.notes: Inserts the new expired listing into Supabase with status pending_skip_trace.

nodes.name: Check Billing Cap
nodes.notes: Reads current month's skip trace usage to check against the cap.

nodes.name: Under Cap?
nodes.notes: Routes to skip trace if under cap, or marks cap_reached if over.

nodes.name: Build CSV for Tracerfy
nodes.notes: Creates the CSV string that Tracerfy expects. The HTTP Request node after this needs to attach it as a file upload.

nodes.name: Submit to Tracerfy
nodes.notes: Submits the CSV to Tracerfy. NOTE: You'll need to configure the csv_file field in n8n's UI to attach the CSV from the Build CSV node as a binary file upload.

nodes.name: Wait 60s
nodes.notes: Tracerfy processes ~1 record in about 1 minute.

nodes.name: Poll Tracerfy Results
nodes.notes: Polls Tracerfy for results. If status is not 'completed', you may need a retry loop back to Wait 60s.

nodes.name: Parse Trace Results
nodes.notes: Parses Tracerfy's response into structured phone/email arrays. Field names may need adjustment after testing with live API — verify exact response keys.

nodes.name: Store Trace Results
nodes.notes: Saves the skip trace results to Supabase.

nodes.name: Build GHL Payload
nodes.notes: Builds the GoHighLevel contact creation payload. IMPORTANT: You must create custom fields in GHL first and replace the 'REPLACE_*' IDs with actual custom field IDs.

nodes.name: Deliver to GoHighLevel
nodes.notes: Creates contact in GHL via API v2.

nodes.name: Log Delivery
nodes.notes: Logs the successful delivery to Supabase.

nodes.name: Mark Delivered
nodes.notes: Updates the listing status to 'delivered' after successful GHL push.

nodes.name: Increment Counter
nodes.notes: Calculates the new skip_traces_used value.

nodes.name: Update Billing
nodes.notes: Updates the billing_tracker with incremented skip trace count.

nodes.name: Mark Cap Reached
nodes.notes: When monthly cap is hit, marks the listing so it won't be retried.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ $('Query MLS Grid — Expired').item.json.value ? $('Query MLS Grid — Expired').item.json.value.reduce((max, r) => r.ModificationTimestamp > max ? r.ModificationTimestamp : max, '') : new Date().toISOString() }}

nodes.name: Update Replication Timestamp
nodes.notes: Stores the MAX ModificationTimestamp from this batch so the next poll picks up where we left off. Also runs on the 'no results' path.
